mapper.sql: id, expense_item_id, storage_key, original_file_name, content_type, size_bytes, sha256_checksum, state, uploaded_by, activated_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM receipt_files WHERE id = #{id} FOR UPDATE

SELECT
FROM receipt_files WHERE expense_item_id = #{expenseItemId} AND state = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT
FROM receipt_files WHERE expense_item_id = #{expenseItemId} AND state = 'ACTIVE' FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO receipt_files ( expense_item_id, storage_key, original_file_name, content_type, size_bytes, sha256_checksum, state, uploaded_by, activated_at ) VALUES ( #{expenseItemId}, #{storageKey}, #{originalFileName}, #{contentType}, #{sizeBytes}, #{sha256Checksum}, #{state}, #{uploadedBy}, #{activatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE receipt_files SET content_type = #{contentType}, size_bytes = #{sizeBytes}, sha256_checksum = #{sha256Checksum}, state = 'PENDING_SCAN', updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND state = 'UPLOADING'
